sources.title: The Missing Corpse ( 1945) DARK COMEDY
sources.description: Concerned about a murder probe, a publisher and his chauffeur embark on a hapless quest to dispose of a rival's corpse.

metadata.Plot: This small OVA starts with the incident at Heavenly Host Elementary School, in which three small children were killed in the school's basement. After that, it shows what the characters did the night before the incident.
metadata.Actors: Satomi Arai, Asami Imai, Eri Kitamura, Rina Satô
